Test possibility of patching fftpack with pyfftw.
No module source outside of scipy.fftpack should contain an import of
the form `from scipy.fftpack import ...`, so that a simple replacement
of scipy.fftpack by the corresponding fftw interface completely swaps
the two FFT implementations.
Because this simply inspects source files, we only need to run the test
on one version of Python.
PathN)
assert_c
TestFFTPackImportc
\s*from.+\.fftpack import .*\nz
*.pyZ
fftpackc
	fullmatch)
line
regexp
E/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/scipy/fftpack/tests/test_import.py
	<genexpr>
z8TestFFTPackImport.test_fftpack_import.<locals>.<genexpr>z#{0} contains an import from fftpack)
scipy
__file__
parent
rglob
parents
tokenize
open
strr
format)
self
base
path
filer
test_fftpack_import
z%TestFFTPackImport.test_fftpack_importN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__r
__doc__
pathlibr
numpy.testingr

<module>
